117 M4G M4G_SURG_WOUND 33c(M4g)Surgical Wounds CHAR 1 The presence of healing and non-healing, open or closed surgical incisions, skin grafts or drainage sites on any part of the body. This category does not include healed surgical sites or stomas. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
